title: Day 51 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - しずかだし、　せつびも　いいし、　いずの　さくらホテルは　どうですか。= How about the Sakura Hotel in Izu? It is quiet and the facilities are nice as well.

Sentence 2 - うみも　きれいだし、　おんせんにも　はいれるし、　いずに　しましょう。= Let's go to Izu since the ocean is clean and you can also enjoy the hot springs.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
